Sources & Context

History

Insight cloud (local)

/today — Symbol or Number of the Day

Daily feature: we pick a symbol or number deterministically from the local corpus to inspire reflection.

/trending — Top searched this week

This list is built from your device’s recent searches and updates in real-time.

    Symbol Trends Dashboard

    A compact weekly view of your most-searched terms, useful for content planning and curiosity.
